archived_reason: Ten minute seed 63 run produced a neural-heavy ecology with strong recombination, broad tool use, causal unlocks, and several standout checkpointed ANNs.

preserved_files.why: Best overall candidate: age 1505, generation 2, 196 offspring, 905 successful tool uses, high energy, broad maxed tool-skill profile.
Late specialist tool champion: 709 successful tool uses and 46 offspring, useful contrast against overall champion.
Best final causal champion: 12 causal unlock score, 337 successful tool uses, 29 offspring.
Learner/literacy contrast case: strong social_learning and written_learning with very low direct tool count.
Early high-capacity tool monster: hidden size 12, 583 successful tool uses, high prediction_weight, no offspring.
Sparse autoencoder trained on the 31 checkpoints from this run for quick microscope-style comparison.
Human-readable SAE training and activation summary.

notes: Organism 1958 is the first one to try if we want to export a high-performing generalist ANN.
Organism 6677 is the one to try if we care specifically about causal-chain behavior.
Organism 3174 is interesting because it looks more like a reader/learner than a direct tool-use winner.
Portable inscription machinery existed during this run but did not fire, so backpack/writing behavior needs more pressure or instrumentation.
